loop1.title: Fuel Tank Anatomy
loop1.note: This meter class (electrical) does not measure fuel volume, flow, or temperature; all fuel-specific slots are intentionally blank.

loop1.title: All Runs (Fuel Log)
loop1.note: Showing total energy and average load — fuel, run hours, and start counts are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Fuel & Tank — Composite
loop1.note: Showing electrical power/energy/voltage as proxy for fuel/temperature — fuel-specific metrics are not measured by this electrical meter.
